summary: Consensus Strong Buy across 42 analysts. Recent upgrades: Raymond James to Outperform (target $115), Guggenheim reiterated Buy (Feb 3, 2026). Some analyst bearish note on Q1 2026 headwinds citing legacy TV networks. Last major upgrade was Jefferies raising target to $144 in June 2025.
